compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for validate.sh shim-refs integration

compiled_state.description: Create tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh. Static grep on validate.sh source for shim-refs. Add .test-index with RED marker.

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis GAP-3): Static grep should check for all integration points: run_check, report_check, tally_check, and LAUNCHED_CHECKS references to shim-refs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
I don't see a ticket description in your message. You've provided the codebase structure but not the actual ticket details (title, description, requirements, etc.).

Please provide the ticket content so I can analyze what changes are needed and identify which source and test files would be most likely to be modified.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Test verifies that validate.sh source contains a shim-refs check call (static grep)
- [ ] Test fails (RED) because validate.sh does not yet contain the shim-refs integration
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for this test file
- [ ] Test runs without errors when check-shim-refs.sh is absent (expected failure, not crash)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh (created), .test-index (modified). Tests: 1 pass, 1 fail (RED as expected).

comments.body: Fixed: RED test for validate.sh shim-refs integration written and verified
